subcodes.first_line: O ye two handmaidens near to the Court of the All-Glorious! Your letter was read, and its contents brought great joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز مقرب درگاه کبریا نامه شما قرائت شد و مضمون سبب مسرت گشت لطف و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance
